title: Why Your Arms Aren't Growing (And What Old Iron Does Differently)
excerpt: You've been curling for months. You hit them twice a week. But your arms look exactly the same. The problem isn't how much arm work you're doing - it's when you're doing it.

title: The Overtraining Trap - and How I Climbed Out of It
excerpt: About three years ago I hit a wall. Not a slow plateau - a wall. My squat went backwards. I dreaded the gym. Here's what happened, what I ignored, and how stripping everything down rebuilt my progress.

title: Why 5×8 Is the Perfect Rep Scheme for Natural Lifters
excerpt: Most lifters obsess over the rep scheme debate. But after years of training naturally, one scheme keeps coming back as the most practical, most productive option: 5 sets of 8 reps. Here's why.
